headline: A Look At Solstice Advanced Materials (SOLS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Event context and recent performance Solstice Advanced Materials (SOLS) has been drawing fresh attention after a period of strong share price moves, with the stock showing positive returns over the past week, month and past 3 months. At a last close of US$78.03 and a market value of about US$12.1b, the company operates at the intersection of specialty chemicals and advanced materials through its Refrigerants & Applied Solutions and Electronic & Specialty Materials segments. See our latest...

headline: Uranium Conversion Capacity Set For Major Expansion

headline: Solstice Advanced Materials to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 6, 2026
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials (NASDAQ: SOLS) ("Solstice" or "the Company") will issue its first quarter financial results before market open on May 6, 2026. The Company will also hold a conference call to discuss the results at 8:30 a.m. ET.
